mission.title: kubearmor: Minikube Start is failing with latest version of minikube (1.26) and k8s(1.24)
mission.description: Minikube Start is failing with latest version of minikube (1.26) and k8s(1.24). Community-reported issue.

steps.title: Identify kubearmor troubleshoot symptoms
steps.description:
Check for the issue in your kubearmor deployment:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n kubearmor -l app.kubernetes.io/name=kubearmor
kubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=kubearmor -n kubearmor --tail=100 | grep -i error
```
Look for errors or warnings in the logs that may indicate the issue.

steps.title: Review kubearmor configuration
steps.description:
Inspect the relevant kubearmor configuration:
```bash
kubectl get all -n kubearmor -l app.kubernetes.io/name=kubearmor
kubectl get configmap -n kubearmor -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=kubearmor
```
## Minikube start

**General Information**

- Environment (minikube)
- Kernel version (Linux eswar-LEGION 5.13.0-52-generic #59~20.04.1-Ubuntu SMP Thu Jun 16 21:21:28 UTC 2022 x86_64 x86_64 x86_64 GNU/Linux)

**To Reproduce**

1.

steps.title: Apply the fix for Minikube Start is failing with latest version of minikube…
steps.description:
I tried using latest version of minikube with virtualbox driver. I was able to get past initial iso installation and the VM booted up fine. The problem was kubearmor was not starting up due to volume mount paths issue. Also minikube VM does not seem to have certain file paths
```yaml
NAMESPACE     NAME                                             READY   STATUS              RESTARTS     AGE
kube-system   coredns-6d4b75cb6d-fsg6n                         1/1     Running             0            57m
kube-system   etcd-minikube                                    1/1     Running             0            57m
kube-system   kube-apiserver-minikube                          1/1     Running             0            57m
kube-system   kube-controller-manager-minikube                 1/1     Running             0            57m
kube-system   kube-proxy-4tz7h                              
```

steps.title: Upgrade kubearmor to include the fix
steps.description:
If the fix is included in a newer release, upgrade kubearmor:
```bash
helm repo update
helm upgrade kubearmor kubearmor/kubearmor --namespace kubearmor
```
Verify the upgrade:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n kubearmor
helm list -n kubearmor
```

steps.title: Confirm Minikube Start is failing with latest version of… is resolved
steps.description:
Verify the fix by checking that the original error no longer occurs:
```bash
kubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=kubearmor -n kubearmor --tail=50 --since=5m
kubectl get events -n kubearmor --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10
```
Confirm that the issue symptoms are gone.

resolution.summary: I tried using latest version of minikube with virtualbox driver. I was able to get past initial iso installation and the VM booted up fine. The problem was kubearmor was not starting up due to volume mount paths issue. Also minikube VM does not seem to have certain file paths (`/sys/kernel/security/lsms`) that kubearmor expects to have.
codeSnippets:
NAMESPACE     NAME                                             READY   STATUS              RESTARTS     AGE
kube-system   coredns-6d4b75cb6d-fsg6n                         1/1     Running             0            57m
kube-system   etcd-minikube                                    1/1     Running             0            57m
kube-system   kube-apiserver-minikube                          1/1     Running             0            57m
kube-system   kube-controller-manager-minikube                 1/1     Running             0            57m
kube-system   kube-proxy-4tz7h                                 1/1     Running             0            57m
kube-system   kube-scheduler-minikube                          1/1     Running             0            57m
kube-system   kubearmor-annotation-manager-8

prerequisites.description: A running Kubernetes cluster with kubearmor installed or the issue environment reproducible.
